content.full_text:
TO: [ ] JEANNE   [ ] JAY
[ ] LYNN        [ ] BARBARA
[ ] RICH        [ ] BOB S.
[ ] HELEN       [x] OTHER Mary Ann

FROM: Carla Wardlow
DATE: January 12, 1984
T-84-011

[x] TELEPHONE ADVICE - SEE BELOW
[ ] CORRESPONDENCE ADVICE - SEE ATTACHED DRAFT
(IF YOU HAVE ANY COMMENTS, NOTIFY ADVISOR WITHIN 1 DAY)

FILE LOCATION: 82015, 89001

INCLUDE IN ADVICE PACKAGE: YES [ ] NO [x]

CALLER: Judy Johnson
REPRESENTING: Assemblywoman Bergeson
PHONE NUMBER: 714-540-4188

QUESTION: May Assemblywoman Bergeson's campaign committee for her 1984 Senate election use extra copies of Bergeson's most recent legislative newsletter to include in a press package to be sent in connection with her Senate election. Mrs. Bergeson has not yet filed a declaration of candidacy.

ANSWER: There is no prohibition against the committee's use of the newsletter. However, the copies would be a non-monetary contribution from the State. The committee should determine the fair market value of the copies and purchase them instead.
